title: Multi-Lane Consolidation Orchestration
consumer_purpose: Orchestrate the consolidation of 7 independent lanes after they complete, resolving shared file conflicts and producing a unified session report
claim_atoms: Cross-lane conflict detection for shared files
content:
{
  "plan_id": "cross-lane-consolidation",
  "title": "Multi-Lane Consolidation Orchestration",
  "boundary": "cross-lane-consolidation",
  "consumer_purpose": "Orchestrate the consolidation of 7 independent lanes after they complete",
  "phases": [
    {
      "phase": 1,
      "name": "Collect Handoffs",
      "actions": [
        "Read all completed handoff messages from 7 lane-owners",
        "Verify each handoff via verify_handoff tool",
        "Categorize by status (completed/failed/blocked)"
      ]
    },
    {
      "phase": 2,
      "name": "Conflict Detection",
      "actions": [
        "Check for shared file conflicts across lanes",
        "Known contention points: packages/opencode/src/campaign/index.ts (Lanes 1,5,7 may all touch this)",
        "Known contention points: packages/opencode/src/event/runtime-event.ts (Lanes 1,5 may both touch this)",
        "Known contention points: packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts (Lanes 1,2,6 may all touch this)",
        "Known contention points: packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts (Lanes 3,4 may both touch this)",
        "Known contention points: packages/opencode/src/campaign/state-machine.ts (Lanes 1,5,7 may all touch this)",
        "Use curate_context to assemble consolidated view"
      ]
    },
    {
      "phase": 3,
      "name": "Integration Validation",
      "actions": [
        "Run typecheck across entire packages/opencode",
        "Identify any import mismatches or type errors from cross-lane dependencies",
        "Verify campaign module wiring is consistent",
        "Verify tool registry has all ported tools registered without duplicates"
      ]
    },
    {
      "phase": 4,
      "name": "Consolidate Fragments",
      "actions": [
        "For each contended file, read the current state",
        "Verify all expected changes from each lane are present",
        "Resolve any missing or conflicting changes",
        "Run typecheck after each consolidation"
      ]
    },
    {
      "phase": 5,
      "name": "Report Generation",
      "actions": [
        "Generate session_diff(format='full')",
        "Call tool_feedback with any friction notes",
        "Register cross-session lessons",
        "Update roadmap_progress for completed items",
        "Call generate_report with comprehensive summary"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "dependencies": ["all 7 lanes must complete before phase 1"],
  "shared_files": {
    "packages/opencode/src/campaign/index.ts": ["lane-1", "lane-5", "lane-7"],
    "packages/opencode/src/event/runtime-event.ts": ["lane-1", "lane-5"],
    "packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts": ["lane-1", "lane-2", "lane-6"],
    "packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts": ["lane-3", "lane-4"],
    "packages/opencode/src/campaign/state-machine.ts": ["lane-1", "lane-5", "lane-7"],
    "packages/opencode/src/campaign/secretary.ts": ["lane-1", "lane-5"],
    "packages/opencode/src/campaign/binder.ts": ["lane-1", "lane-7"]
  }
}
